name: Engine Seizure
description: Ancient engines from before the Collapse are being seized and weaponized. Each activation causes reality distortions, and the mastermind seeks to awaken the Prime Engine beneath the Reach.
finaleDungeonFeel: A vast subterranean machine-temple of brass and crystal. Gears the size of houses turn endlessly. Arcane conduits pulse with violet energy. Steam vents hiss from ruptured pipes. The Prime Engine sits at the center, a sphere of compressed potential that warps space around it.

events.name: Engine Anomalies
events.description: Minor reality distortions are being reported near old engine sites.

events.name: Power Surge
events.description: A major power surge has disrupted the Reach's defenses for a night.

events.name: Stolen Components
events.description: A shipment of engine components was hijacked on the road.

events.name: Engineered Monsters
events.description: Monsters fused with engine-tech have been spotted in the wilds.

events.name: The Blackout
events.description: A cascading power failure has plunged the outer districts into darkness.

events.name: Core Breach Imminent
events.description: Engine readings indicate an imminent core breach beneath the Reach.

events.name: The Prime Engine
events.description: The Prime Engine has been located. It must be destroyed before it awakens fully.
